steps.t: You have travelled with Corudan to the opposite shore, very near to the Haven of Bâkhridar, an encampment of Heirsworn within Sûg Nidar.
Corudan asked you to search supply crates within the Haven of Bâkhridar and then meet him and Rahâzi on the other side.
Rahâzi and Corudan agreed to meet up with you south-east of the Haven of Bâkhridar.
Rahâzi stands south-east of the Haven of Bâkhridar.
Corudan stands south-east of the Haven of Bâkhridar.
